title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Amazon Books India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
